heat.note: 6-step OKLCH intensity ramp for the busy-hours heatmap; hue drifts 75→55 as intensity rises. Top two levels carry a 45deg pattern overlay for colorblind a11y.

display.purpose: Dashboard/super-admin section openers and page titles. 700/800 weight only.

storefront-display.purpose: Landing/tenant-site heroes only; gives the public door a warmer retail voice.

title.purpose: Card titles, page headers, section labels.

body.purpose: All operational copy at 14px. Cap 65–75ch in marketing prose.

label.purpose: Buttons, badges, table headers, form labels. Never uppercase-tracked eyebrows.

shadows.name: hairline-ring
shadows.purpose: Default container boundary — cards, popovers, dialogs. The workhorse; use ~90% of the time.

shadows.name: bento-hard
shadows.purpose: Neo-brutalist offset shadow. Super-admin back-office accent ONLY. Forbidden on tenant-facing surfaces.

shadows.name: bento-hard-sm
shadows.purpose: Small variant of the bento shadow for inner panel cells.

shadows.name: popover-lift
shadows.purpose: Momentary elevation for floating layers — menus, dialogs, sheets. Removed on close.

shadows.name: fab-glow
shadows.purpose: The single ambient shadow — reserved for the persistent WhatsApp FAB.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and entrances.

motion.name: scroll-reveal
motion.purpose: Landing section reveals. Decorative — content must be visible without it.

motion.name: soft-pulse
motion.value: 2s ease-in-out infinite; box-shadow 0→12px ring in WhatsApp green at 0.4→0 alpha

motion.name: marquee
motion.purpose: Horizontal scroller (currently unused on landing — PaymentMarquee is static).

motion.name: reduced-motion-guard
motion.purpose: Mandatory: every animation degrades to instant/crossfade. Already shipped in globals.css — preserve it.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default operational CTA. Counter Indigo in-app, re-skins to Buka-Browser Sky under .pub-scope.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 32px; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-primary, #4f46e5); color: var(--color-primary-foreground, #fff); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s var(--ease-out-quint, cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)), transform 0.1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-brand-700, #4338ca); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-ring, #6366f1) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Primary Button — Touch
components.description: 44px-tall mobile primary action. Meets WCAG touch-target minimum.
components.css: .ds-btn-touch { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-primary, #4f46e5); color: #fff; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s var(--ease-out-quint, cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)); } .ds-btn-touch:hover { background: var(--color-brand-700, #4338ca); } .ds-btn-touch:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-ring, #6366f1) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action — white fill, hairline border, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 32px; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: var(--color-foreground, #0a0a0f); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #e4e4e7); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--color-muted, #f1f1f4); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-ring, #6366f1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-ring, #6366f1) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: 32px-tall operator input. text-base prevents iOS zoom. Focus = ring color + 3px ring.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 32px; width: 100%; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: var(--color-foreground, #0a0a0f); border: 1px solid var(--color-input, #e4e4e7); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-muted-foreground, #71717a); } .ds-input:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-input, #e4e4e7) 30%, #fff); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-ring, #6366f1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-ring, #6366f1) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default container — Surface white, 8px radius, hairline ring, no resting shadow. Footer band uses muted fill.
components.html:
Order Hari Ini

12 order aktif
Lihat semua
components.css: .ds-card { border-radius: 12px; background: var(--color-card, #ffffff); color: var(--color-card-foreground, #0a0a0f); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-foreground, #0a0a0f) 10%, transparent); padding: 16px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; } .ds-card-header { margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { line-height: 1.5; } .ds-card-footer { margin-top: 16px; padding-top: 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border, #e4e4e7); background: var(--color-muted, #f1f1f4); border-radius: 0 0 12px 12px; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Status Badge — Paid
components.description: Dual-coded status (tinted bg + colored text + WORD label). Never color alone. Model for all status badges.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-badge-paid { background: color-mix(in oklch, #10b981 15%, transparent); color: #047857; } .ds-badge-paid::before { content: ''; display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #10b981; margin-right: 6px; }

components.name: Metric Tile
components.description: Dashboard/super-admin KPI tile. Tinted icon circle, large tabular-nums value, uppercase label. Enters with tile-in.
components.html:
Rp
4,2Jt
OMSET HARI INI
components.css: .ds-metric { border-radius: 12px; background: var(--color-card, #ffffff); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-foreground, #0a0a0f) 10%, transparent); padding: 20px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-metric-icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 9999px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary, #4f46e5) 12%, transparent); color: var(--color-primary, #4f46e5); font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; } .ds-metric-value { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; color: var(--color-foreground, #0a0a0f); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-feature-settings: 'tnum' 1; } .ds-metric-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-muted-foreground, #71717a); }

components.name: WhatsApp FAB
components.description: The single persistent floating element on public surfaces. 56px circle, bottom-right, soft-pulse glow.
components.css: .ds-fab { position: fixed; bottom: 24px; right: 24px; width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #25d366; color: #ffffff; border: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(37,211,102,0.4); animation: ds-soft-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; z-index: 50; transition: transform 0.15s; } .ds-fab:hover { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-fab:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #fff, 0 0 0 6px rgba(37,211,102,0.6); } @keyframes ds-soft-pulse { 0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(37,211,102,0.4); } 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 12px rgba(37,211,102,0); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-fab { animation: none; } }

components.name: Bento Panel (super-admin)
components.description: Back-office accent — 8px radius, 2px ink border, hard offset shadow. Super-admin ONLY.
components.css: .ds-bento { border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-card, #ffffff); color: var(--color-foreground, #0a0a0f); border: 2px solid var(--color-foreground, #0a0a0f); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 0 var(--color-foreground, #0a0a0f); padding: 16px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-bento-value { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-bento-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-muted-foreground, #71717a); margin-top: 4px; }

narrative.overview: hivePOS is the browser tab that behaves like a wiped-down Indonesian laundry counter at 9am — light, honest, natively Indonesian, ready the instant it's opened. Two committed hues across two surfaces, never mixed: Counter Indigo runs the app; Buka-Browser Sky runs the public door via a single scoped token override (.pub-scope) so the same components re-skin without forking. Density is operator-grade, not marketing-air: 32px controls, 8px card radii, tabular-aligned money, hairline ring borders, flat surfaces by default. The one place the system raises its voice is the bento hard-shadow in the super-admin back office. Motion is purposeful and always carries a prefers-reduced-motion off-switch. The system explicitly rejects heavy iPad-POS aesthetics, all-in-one suite bloat, hardware-bundle lock-in, and the 2026 'warm AI' landing default (no cream/sand body, no gradient text, no glassmorphism-as-decoration, no hero-metric template as reflex).
keyCharacteristics: Two committed hues, two surfaces, never mixed (indigo in-app, sky on .pub-scope).
Operator-grade density: 32px controls, tabular money, hairline ring borders.
Flat by default; the bento hard-shadow is a rare, deliberate super-admin accent.
Motion with a mandatory reduced-motion off-switch.
Hex is canonical for the core palette (iOS Safari < 15.4); OKLCH reserved for the heat ramp.
Indonesian context (kiloan, QRIS, WhatsApp, 58mm thermal) is the happy path, not a localization afterthought.

rules.name: The Two-Hue Rule
rules.body: One surface, one hue. Indigo inside the app; sky on .pub-scope. Never mix. The token override enforces this at the layer, not by hand.

rules.name: The Money-Is-Tabular Rule
rules.body: Every currency figure renders with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. No exceptions, no ad-hoc .toString(). Money that wobbles looks wrong.

rules.name: The Muted-Slate Rule
rules.body: #71717a is for metadata only. Readable sentences step up to Ink. On #fafafa it sits at ~4.6:1 — borderline WCAG AA for body.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: No uppercase-tracked kickers above every section. Numbered markers only where a real ordered sequence exists.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only for genuinely floating layers (dialog, popover, FAB) or the deliberate super-admin bento accent.

rules.name: The No-Glass Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter blur is forbidden as a default surface treatment — rare, named exception (landing nav/hero, light mode only).

dos: Do keep one hue per surface: Counter Indigo in the app, Buka-Browser Sky on .pub-scope.
Do render every currency figure with tabular-nums (.sa-tnum).
Do dual-code status (color + text label + pattern where high-stakes), modeled on the heatmap.
Do keep a visible focus-visible ring (ring-3 ring-ring/50) on every interactive element.
Do use concrete Indonesian copy: 'Rp 49K/outlet', '2 menit', '1 outlet gratis'.
Do ship prefers-reduced-motion fallbacks on every animation.
Do reach for the bento hard-shadow in the super-admin panel when the back office wants energy.
donts: Don't use border-left/border-right > 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient).
Don't use glassmorphism / backdrop-filter as a default surface treatment.
Don't reproduce the hero-metric template (big number + small label + supporting stats + gradient) as a reflex.
Don't put an uppercase-tracked eyebrow above every section, or numbered 01/02/03 markers where there's no real sequence.
Don't use a cream/sand/beige body background — Counter White #fafafa is a true near-white on purpose.
Don't use Muted-Slate #71717a for body text or placeholders — step readable sentences up to Ink.
Don't pretend to be enterprise — no platform/solution/ecosystem posture, no buzzwords.
Don't name competitors (Moka, Majoo, Qasir) in product UI.
